# `!github_release`

**Category:** integrations

Query the GitHub release API and store the best-matching release version (semver-parsed) into a host variable. Passive — resolves and records the version string, does not download assets.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `repo` | string | yes | GitHub repo in owner/name form (e.g. ipfs/kubo). |
| `channel` | string | no | Release channel: stable/latest (non-prerelease), unstable (prereleases), prerelease (smart: prefers stable of same version over its RC), any. Default latest. |
| `version_filter` | string | no | Cargo-style semver requirement to constrain candidates (e.g. ^18.0.0, >=2.0.0). |
| `save` | string | no | Host-fact var name to write the resolved version into (use save XOR set). |
| `set` | string | no | Magic var name to write the resolved version into (use set XOR save). |

## Examples

```yaml
- !github_release
  repo: ipfs/kubo
  channel: stable
  version_filter: ^0.20.0
  save: ipfs_version
```
